faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about healthcare staffing with SyndeoCare. From getting started to managing shifts and credentials.

items.question: What is SyndeoCare?
items.answer: SyndeoCare is a healthcare staffing platform that connects qualified healthcare professionals with facilities that need temporary or permanent staff. We handle matching, scheduling, credential verification, and payments.

items.question: How do I sign up as a healthcare professional?
items.answer: Create an account, select your profession, complete your profile with qualifications and documents, and start browsing available shifts in your area.

items.question: How does credential verification work?
items.answer: When you upload your documents (licenses, certifications, etc.), our team verifies them against official registries. Once verified, you can start accepting shifts immediately.

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: SyndeoCare is free for healthcare professionals. Clinics pay a small platform fee on each booking. Contact us for volume pricing.

items.question: What cities do you operate in?
items.answer: SyndeoCare currently operates across major cities in Saudi Arabia including Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, and Mecca. We are expanding to new regions regularly.
